title: バクシン！　アットー的スピード！

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Salutations and good morning to you, my dear trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I can hardly wait to begin our training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I was so excited last night that I ran for eight hours straight! In
my dreams, of course!
choice_data_list: Sounds like you got a good night's sleep!
Sounds like you got a good night's sleep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I sure did!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... I can't wait to tell my parents. They'll hardly believe their
ears...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Mom, Dad, I did it! I won the Arima Kinen, the Japan Cup, the Tenno
Sho, the Takarazuka Kinen, the Kikuka Sho, and the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your little genius did it! I've fulfilled my true purpose as class
representative and become the model for Umamusume everywhere!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I look forward to seeing what you have in store for me
this afternoon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to win all the G1 races Bakushin O mentioned, an
Umamusume needs to be a well-rounded talent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However, in her case, there's only one skill she should polish...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that in mind, I prep for our afternoon training session.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Trainer, I'm ready! Give me a training regimen worthy of a class
representative!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I quickly go over the regimen I created for Sakura Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho... So we're doing ladder drills to start, eh? Roger that! This will
make the perfect warm-up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Watch me finish these drills in three minutes flat! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... All done! Now... on to practicing the start of the race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Just need to get into position and...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Raaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Phew, now THAT'S what I call a warm-up! I'm on fire!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready to move on to the main event! Let's see, next up is... an
interval run...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait... Wait, wait, wait, WAAAAIIIT!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wh-what is the meaning of this?! This training regimen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: This is obviously focused on SPRINTING!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: This is NOT what we talked about! I refuse to become a sprinter!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Weren't YOU the one who said we'd overcome every single race
together?! H-how could you—
choice_data_list: First of all, I need you to calm down.
First of all, I need you to calm down.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I-I am calm! I swear!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
B-but these exercises are clearly designed to prepare me for
short-distance sprints! If we were getting ready for marathons, we'd
be working on my pace!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Inhale... My sincerest apologies. My reaction was not exactly befitting of my station, was it?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The rational, coolheaded class representative has returned, so please,
explain yourself!
choice_data_list: What's the key to winning every race?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Why, that would be speed, of course!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You must be the fastest on the track, not just at the beginning or end
of the race, but both! Only then can you reach the finish line before
the other racers!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So if my goal is to be the greatest Umamusume, then I must be the
fastest!
choice_data_list: Right, which is why we're working on speed!
Right, which is why we're working on speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I-I see! So this is just another step on my journey to becoming a model
class representative I aspire to be! Brilliant!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, you DID say you want to use my speed to
take on all the G1 races!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You... you really DO understand me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I should never have doubted you! From now on, I promise to believe
in you, no matter what! This, I swear!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Anyway, back to training! Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Sakura Bakushin O's trust in me now solidified, we spend our
days building up her speed until finally, it's time to put her skills to
the test.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Graaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Sakura Bakushin O leaps out of the starting gate and takes the lead in no time flat! What astounding speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, Bakushin, Bakushiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Finish! Sakura Bakushin O maintains her lead and finishes in first
place! Her speed has the crowd going wild! Listen to those cheers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Thank you, thank you! Your beloved class representative
couldn't have done it without you!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Completely obliterating the competition, Sakura Bakushin O has won
her debut race, the 1,200-meter dirt course!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Class representative and first-place winner, Sakura Bakushin O, at your service!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You know, I could be asking you why my debut race is a sprint, but I won't!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This is just an appetizer, isn't it?! Don't worry, I've got your plan aaall
figured out!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I trust you to make me the perfect class representative! One with a
win in every G1 race under her belt! Let's get this Bakushin show on
the road!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This "Bakushin show" certainly does have a long road ahead of it, but
Sakura Bakushin O and I are determined to make it work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps someday... in the distant future... We can make her dreams
come true!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Look out, future, here we come! Bakushin, Bakushiiin!
